reviews.review_msg: Hot and funny.  He made watching his lectures very enjoyable!
Compared to the other marketing profs, Adam was pretty good!
I took 478 with Adam 2 years ago and I am still laughing!!!

Adam is definitely passionate about teaching and I did throughly enjoy his class. However, he takes too much of a marketing approach to strategy. I understand that is his concentration but he neglects all other aspects. Furthermore, I wish he spent more time on admin - his expectations can get a bit confusing. But an easy grade nonetheless.
Awesome teacher, dynamic, passionate and very interesting
I have never bothered to rate a prof, But Adam is so great that i had spread his awesomeness. The best prof by far.

Not sure if everyone will appreciate this but I loved the uncensored enthusiasm/craziness. Very engaging speaker, shares cool marketing tidbits ex. quality formula, and dissects cases creatively. I found the weird/boring cases like Shouldice and Curled Metal to be the coolest actually, and I also liked the cool trading assignment. Recommended!

Adam is one of the best profs I've had. He is very enthusiastic about the course content and is willing to help students in any way he can. He makes classes feel fun and you will learn a lot - way more than in boring lectures. Take 478 with him if you can! You will be glad you did.
He's a keeper.
Very enthusiastic and fun professor. Treats students as business partners. Pretty hot too ;)

Adam is an incredible professor. He is passionate about teaching and will go to great lengths to motivate his students. Not only is he willing to go above and beyond for his students in the classroom, he is always more than willing to lend a hand in career guidance. Take his class, have fun and learn lots!

He is an awesome teacher and a person with golden heart. He knows his stuff very well.He is always passionate to teach and to help everybody. When you are in his class you don't need to worry about anything. He makes sure that each student understands everything. He will motivate you, he will support you. He will be there 4 u all the time.
Awesome prof! Very passionate and very helpful. If you don't take 478 with him you will regret it! Great experience overall!
Adam is awesome!
Adam is an awesome teacher! You need to take Adam Mills if you are enrolled in Beedie.

Best pro ever, get his class no question ask. No weekly paper, 20 pages report stuff, just attend his lecture and have fun! that's it.. you will regret if you dont take it with him.. good luck if you take it with other profs, and have fun if you take it with him.. thats all i got to say!

Simply put, Adam is an incredible professor. He has passion for his job and genuinely wants his students to succeed. Adam will go out of his way to help you, whether it is with academic or work stuff. If you put the time and effort in, you will learn a great amount and succeed. Adam readies you for the real world, so be prepared to work.
Best marketing prof ever.
Best prof at SFU. period. If you are in business, you have to take this class! You learn stuff that's actually relevant to your future career, and you'll have a great time.

Best professor I've ever taken a class with. He really knows how to engage the class and steer discussions. A large part of your marks is based on class participation though. His teaching style rewards learning, more so than doing things to attain a good grade. I highly recommend taking a class with Adam.
Prof. Mills is a quality teacher.  He has definitely increased my level of interest in a topic that I once found to be uninteresting.  I would recommend a class from him.
Good prof!!!
I best prof in sfu!I like the way how he encourage students to think and talk in class. You can really learn something from him. Homework and exam are easy.
Good professor!
Super hot and super awesome prof!!!

He's very charming first of all. However, personally I'm not very favor of his teaching style as he teaches nothing from textbook, but exams are all based on textbook. His exam is all MC, but tricky. He doesn't have paper to write but video shooting instead. His slides are NOT downloadable, which is not good.
Awesome prof! It shows he likes teaching. Really encourages class participation. You gotta be willing to speak freely in a class environment. Really great with business cases
Best prof ever.

One of the best professors at SFU. Will do anything to help out his students and is extremely available for extra help. Makes dry material really interesting and keeps the class engaged. Made a boring class fantastic! Take any class with Adam and you will learn SO much.

Best prof I have ever had at SFU.  He's really easy going, very educated, and is always willing to help. I always look forward to going to his class.  Love his teaching style, nothing on text. Every week, we just read a case and have a class discussion for 2 hours, and you'd be amazed to find out how much you can actually learn from peers and him

Adam is awesome! He really cares about students and is approachable. Adam has a great sense of humor and always keeps students thinking. He really loves Jersey Shore. He is one of my fav prof's of all time.
